description: This is a Python script that serves as a shim for the Django manage.py command. It forwards execution from the project root to the actual manage.py located within the backend/ directory, to facilitate command execution in environments where manage.py might not be directly accessible.

methods.name: None main()
methods.description: Handles forwarding Django management commands to the backend/manage.py script, checking for its existence, adjusting sys.path, and executing it.
